CheckTitle: RDS Snapshots and Cluster Snapshots are 暗号化済み.をチェックします
Description: RDS Snapshots and Cluster Snapshots are 暗号化済み.をチェックします
Risk: your manual Amazon RDS データベース スナップショット are 暗号化済み in order to achieve compliance for data-at-rest 暗号化 within your 組織.を確認します

Recommendation.Text: When working with production データベースs that hold sensitive and critical data, it is strongly recommended to implement 暗号化 at rest and protect your data from attackers or unauthorized personnel.
